desc: Miskolc works best for travellers who want northeastern Hungary's cave-bath, forest-edge, and castle mix rather than another polished Danube city break. It makes most sense as a 2-4 night base pairing Miskolctapolca and Lillafüred with Diósgyőr and seasonal events, not as a Budapest substitute.
hls: Avas cellars and local wine culture

todo.name: Miskolctapolca Cave Bath session
todo.desc: Use the cave pools for the one experience that clearly separates Miskolc from other Hungarian city breaks.

todo.name: Lillafüred Hanging Gardens and waterfall
todo.desc: Pair the terraced gardens with the waterfall and lake area so Lillafüred feels like more than a quick photo stop.

todo.name: Anna Cave guided visit
todo.desc: See the rare travertine cave chambers just below the Lillafüred gardens on an easy guided stop.

todo.name: Diósgyőr Castle area
todo.desc: Check the reconstruction and events calendar, then use the castle precinct or tournament arena for medieval-history context.

todo.name: Avas cellars evening
todo.desc: Base one evening around the old wine-cellar district rather than staying only in the modern center.

todo.name: Bükk foothills day out
todo.desc: Use Miskolc as the easiest urban launch pad for a short forest-and-valley day in the Bükk edge country.

wifi.note: Usually easy in the center and in modern apartments, but spa zones, hillside outings, and older guesthouses can feel much less predictable than Budapest.

prac.fltNote: Miskolc has no passenger airport. Most UK and Ireland trips route through Budapest, then continue roughly 2.5-3 hours by train, coach, or car; Košice can work for some itineraries but still leaves a cross-border ground leg. Keep destination-level nonstop flags false, because the real planning variable is the final transfer rather than the flight itself.
prac.lang: Hungarian; English is common in larger hotels, spas, and visitor-facing venues
prac.visa: Hungary applies Schengen entry rules; UK and Irish travellers should verify passport validity and 90-in-180-day limits before travel.
alerts: Diósgyőr Castle is under reconstruction, so treat the area as an events/history stop rather than a guaranteed full castle interior visit.
The Cave Bath closes for annual maintenance windows, so check opening status before building your whole trip around it.
Late-evening transport back from Lillafüred or Miskolctapolca is thinner than central-city travel suggests.

sweet: Late May to June and September are usually Miskolc's best balance of green scenery, lighter hiking conditions, and usable spa-and-castle days without midsummer heat or winter gloom.
